mainCharacter.name: Heli
mainCharacter.vehicleColor: sunshine yellow, white nose, sky-blue lower stripe, coral-red tail tip
mainCharacter.bodyShape: compact rounded helicopter cabin, short tail boom, four-blade charcoal rotor
mainCharacter.eyesAndFace: large warm-brown windshield eyes, soft brows, small friendly smile
mainCharacter.landingGear: two short silver skids with dark charcoal foot pads
mainCharacter.accessories: blue beacon, silver mirrors, sky-blue heart emblem; blue cargo sling only on Pages 5-11
mainCharacter.forbidden: human-like arms or hands, readable text, logos, extra rotors, wheels

supportingCharacters.Piper: forest-green compact pickup, cream roof, amber windshield eyes, tan bumpers, four black tires, pine-tree emblem
supportingCharacters.Mountain friends: one small white goat with gray horns and one cinnamon-brown rabbit with upright ears

setting: Sunrise Valley rescue pad, pine mountains, pearly mist, silver waterfall, and purple-flowered Lookout Meadow
propContinuity: Honey-brown basket with coral cloth; blue cargo sling visible only while Heli carries or lowers the basket on Pages 5-11.
safeZone: Every page keeps characters, faces, vehicle features, animals, required objects, and story action above y=760; bottom area is only low-detail grass, stone, water, or sky reflection.
